2026-02-27T01:45:52.3914557Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-02-27T01:45:52.3959696Z git version 2.52.0
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4011942Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/4054957b-3287-4175-80d1-e6e44d0abee4/.gitconfig'
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4026991Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/4054957b-3287-4175-80d1-e6e44d0abee4' before making global git config changes
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4033050Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4045494Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/coding/coding
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4096349Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4102908Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4144842Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4334787Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4339344Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4377571Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4637033Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4643145Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-02-27T01:45:52.4681171Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
